findings.description: Webhook signing secret committed to source (matched jwt-secret-style custom rule)
findings.remediation: Rotate the webhook secret in Stripe immediately; load from env/Vault; purge from history with git-filter-repo.
findings.source: implementing-secret-scanning-with-gitleaks (Output Format NEW FINDINGS (blocking); jwt-secret custom rule; baseline so only new findings block)

note: A committed HMAC signing secret is the first half of the forge-signature chain; scan_crypto_timing supplies the second half.
